title: nectandra punctata var. elongata
intro: Nectandra punctata var. elongata, also known as the Peruvian sandalo wood, is a variant of the Nectandra punctata plant, a species of evergreen tree native to South America. The medicinal properties of Nectandra punctata var. elongata are attributed to its essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Nectandra punctata var. elongata include essential oil extracts, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
